title: Body Parsing, Raw Webhooks, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Byte Limits
description: Parsers accept decompression bombs, req.body is assumed present, raw webhook bytes are lost, multipart data is buffered without caps, and aborted uploads leak work. Learners cumulatively produce bounded body ownership and parser matrix through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Configure express.json type, limit, inflate, strict, reviver, and verify behavior while treating req.body as undefined until parsing succeeds.
Enforce declared, compressed, decoded, field-count, nesting, and semantic-size budgets before expensive parsing or effects.
Preserve exact raw bytes for signature verification while separating timestamp, replay, media type, decode, validation, and enqueue decisions.
